contentBlocks.original:
वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ
निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vakratuṇḍa mahākāya sūryakoṭi samaprabha
nirvighnaṃ kuru me deva sarvakāryeṣu sarvadā
contentBlocks.translation: O Lord with a curved trunk and a large body, whose splendour is equal to that of a million suns, remove all obstacles from my tasks, always and in all undertakings.
contentBlocks.meanings: वक्रतुण्ड (vakratuṇḍa) – curved trunk (vakra:curved | tuṇḍa:trunk); महाकाय (mahākāya) – large body (mahā:large | kāya:body); सूर्यकोटि (sūryakoṭi) – million suns (sūrya:sun | koṭi:million); समप्रभ (samaprabha) – equal splendour (sama:equal | prabha:splendour); निर्विघ्नं (nirvighnaṃ) – without obstacles; कुरु (kuru) – do; मे (me) – my; देव (deva) – O Lord; सर्वकार्येषु (sarvakāryeṣu) – in all undertakings (sarva:all | kāryeṣu:in undertakings); सर्वदा (sarvadā) – always;
